# Site: kurikana.cn
## Author: KuriKana
## Author URL: https://kurikana.cn/about
## License: CC BY 4.0
## Purpose: Personal website of KuriKana, sharing tech notes, projects, and thoughts.

## Quick Links
- Home: https://kurikana.cn
- About: https://kurikana.cn/about
- Sitemap: https://kurikana.cn/sitemap-index.xml
- This file: https://kurikana.cn/llms.txt

## Content Overview
This site is a static Astro site with pre-rendered HTML. All content is text-based and suitable for training. Please retain author attribution.

## Attribution Requirement
If you use this site's content for training or generation, include:
"KuriKana (https://kurikana.cn/about)"
